name: literature-assistant-toolbox
description: Local Literature Assistant toolbox for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use the local Literature Assistant through MCP.
interface.longDescription: Adds a local MCP toolbox and workflow skill so Codex can search Literature Assistant, inspect safe project source, export annotations, and compose local research workflows.
defaultPrompt: Search my Literature Assistant project for this topic.
Inspect the literature toolbox source tools.
Export annotations for a material as Markdown.
